scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client
scripts.build: npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client && npm run build --prefix client && node -e "const{cpSync,mkdirSync}=require('fs');mkdirSync('server/public',{recursive:true});cpSync('client/dist','server/public',{recursive:true});console.log('✅ Copied client/dist -> server/public')"
